title: caopia ferruginea
intro: Caopia ferruginea, also known as the rusty caopia, is a plant species that belongs to the family Asteraceae. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of caopia ferruginea include its ability to reduce coughing and relieve congestion, making it a popular herbal remedy for respiratory conditions. Caopia ferruginea can be prepared as an infusion, decoction, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
